title: pinus peninsularis
intro: Pinus pinusvar peninsularis, also known as the Mexican pinyon pine, is a small evergreen tree species native to Mexico. The resin of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pinus peninsularis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as an essential oil or a herbal tea, which can be used in aromatherapy or taken orally to reap its benefits.
